Description: Umbraco Restricted Content plugin: member-only content gates, role-based access and paywall support using IPublicAccessService. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
